Death at a Funeral (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $8,580,428Details
International Box Office $38,708,720
Worldwide Box Office $47,289,148
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$1,282,973 (15.0% of total gross)
Legs:6.69 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:18.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:260 opening theaters/324 max. theaters, 8.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $14,914,670

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 17th, 2007 (Wide) by MGM
International Releases: October 12th, 2007 (Wide), released as Death At A Funeral (Australia)
Video Release: February 26th, 2008 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: R for language and drug content
Running Time: 91 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Remade
Plot point: Blackmail, Dysfunctional Family, Funeral Reunions, In-Laws / Future In-Laws, LGBTQ+, Narcotics, White Collar Crime, Writing and Writers
Subgenre: Black Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures, Sidney Kimmel Entertainment, Parabolic Pictures, Stable Way Entertainment, VIP Medienfonds 1+2, Target Media
Production Countries: United Kingdom
Languages: English
